title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at La Opala

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at La Opala
jsonLd.description:
We at La Opala are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Thane. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About La Opala:
La Opala is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with La Opala!
